name: Live streaming (hydrated)
action: apply SSE events in-place; enforce store cap via evictToCap

name: Loading older
condition_in: scroll-spy sentinel intersects AND user-gesture marker fresh

name: Part expanding
action: fetch GET /session/:id/message/:mid/part/:pid and patch in place
condition_in: user clicks expand on truncated completed part

name: Invariants (not a runtime step)
notes: No transition from S2 back to S1 exists — once hydrated, never re-hydrate (no force-refetch).
No transition fires on SSE reconnect, visibility change, online event, or timer.
S3 transition gate requires BOTH scroll-spy intersection AND user-gesture marker.
